{
    _logger.LogInformation(
        "DIA notification requested. SendErrorEmail: {SendErrorEmail}, LogError: {LogError}, Title: {LogErrorTitle}, ProcessName: {LogErrorProcessName}.",
        sendErrorEmail,
        logError,
        logErrorTitle,
        logErrorProcessName);

    if (!logError)
    {
        _logger.LogInformation(
            "DIA notification log creation skipped because LogError is false. Title: {LogErrorTitle}.",
            logErrorTitle);

        return Task.CompletedTask;
    }

    var logEntity = new Microsoft.Xrm.Sdk.Entity("tpc_logs");

    logEntity["tpc_name"] = logErrorTitle;
    logEntity["tpc_emailcreated"] = sendErrorEmail;
    logEntity["tpc_formattedmessage"] = logErrorFormattedError;
    logEntity["tpc_processname"] = logErrorProcessName;

    if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(logType) && int.TryParse(logType, out int parsedLogType))
    {
        logEntity["tpc_logtype"] = new Microsoft.Xrm.Sdk.OptionSetValue(parsedLogType);
    }

    Guid logId = await _dataverseRepository.CreateAsync(logEntity, cancellationToken);

    _logger.LogInformation(
        "DIA notification log record created. LogId: {LogId}, Title: {LogErrorTitle}.",
        logId,
        logErrorTitle);
}
